description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In its before_script run: apt-get update >/dev/null, apt-get install -y locales >/dev/null, echo "en_US UTF-8" > /etc/locale.gen, locale-gen en_US.UTF-8, export LANG=en_US.UTF-8, export LANGUAGE=en_US:en, export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8, curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_10.x | bash -, apt-get install -y nodejs, npm -d install, npm install gulp-cli -g, npm install gulp -D. In the script run: gem install rake, gem install jekyll, bundle install, gulp, bundle exec jekyll build -d public. Publish the public directory as a pages artifact.
